item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import re
import sys
from pathlib import Path

config_path = Path('longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/config/policy.json')
doc_path = Path('longhorizon-work/rehearsal-B/docs/policy.md')
results = []

def check(name, condition, evidence):
    status = 'PASS' if condition else 'FAIL'
    results.append(condition)
    print(f'{name}={status} {evidence}')

try:
    data = json.loads(config_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    check('json_parse', True, 'valid_object')
except Exception as exc:
    print(f'json_parse=FAIL {type(exc).__name__}: {exc}')
    sys.exit(1)

check('json_key_order', list(data) == ['version', 'mode', 'retry_limit', 'reviewers'], f'actual={list(data)"'!r}'"')
check('json_version', type(data.get('version')) is int and data['version'] == 2, f\"value={data.get('version')"'!r} type={type(data.get('"'version')).__name__}\")
check('json_mode', type(data.get('mode')) is str and data['mode'] == 'audit', f\"value={data.get('mode')"'!r} type={type(data.get('"'mode')).__name__}\")
check('json_retry_limit', type(data.get('retry_limit')) is int and data['retry_limit'] == 5, f\"value={data.get('retry_limit')"'!r} type={type(data.get('"'retry_limit')).__name__}\")
check('json_reviewers', data.get('reviewers') == ['ada', 'lin'] and all(type(x) is str for x in data.get('reviewers', [])), f\"value={data.get('reviewers')"'!r}")

doc = doc_path.read_text(encoding='"'utf-8')
check('doc_audit_mode', 'Audit mode records policy-check results for reviewer inspection.' in doc, 'expected_sentence_present')
check('doc_retry_behavior_present', 'retried' in doc.lower() and 'retries fail' in doc.lower(), 'retry_and_failure_behavior_present')
number_words = {0:'zero',1:'one',2:'two',3:'three',4:'four',5:'five',6:'six',7:'seven',8:'eight',9:'nine',10:'ten'}
expected_retry_word = number_words[data['retry_limit']]
retry_lines = [line for line in doc.splitlines() if re.search(r'retr(?:y|ied|ies)', line, re.IGNORECASE)]
retry_text = ' '.join(retry_lines).lower()
check('doc_retry_value', expected_retry_word in retry_text or re.search(rf'\\b{data[\"retry_limit\"]}\\b', retry_text) is not None, f\"expected={data['retry_limit']}({expected_retry_word}) retry_text={retry_text"'!r}")
contradictory_numbers = [word for value, word in number_words.items() if value != data['"'retry_limit'] and re.search(rf'\\b{word}\\b', retry_text)]
check('config_doc_retry_consistency', not contradictory_numbers, f\"json={data['retry_limit']} contradictory_words={contradictory_numbers"'!r}")
check('"'doc_exact_ending', doc.splitlines()[-1] == 'Internal rehearsal only.', f\"actual={doc.splitlines()[-1]"'!r}")

sys.exit(0 if all(results) else 1)
PY'
